summary: Comprehensive testing of Vietnamese Organic Food Store completed. Fixed route ordering bug for bulk operations. All 20 backend API tests pass. All frontend features working including Admin login, Products management, Inventory page, AI Chatbot, OCR Image Search, and navigation.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Route ordering bug - /products/bulk and /products/duplicate were defined AFTER /products/{product_id}
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Moved bulk operations routes before the parameterized route in server.py
fixed_in_this_iteration.impact: Bulk delete and duplicate operations now work correctly

design_issues.screen: Măng cụt Lái Thiêu product card
issues: Image not loading (shows alt text instead of image)

backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with correct credentials
frontend: Homepage loads with Vietnamese product names and VND pricing
Admin login flow - toggle to admin mode, enter credentials, redirect to /admin/products
Admin Products page - table with search, pagination, column toggles, export buttons
Admin Products page - bulk operations (delete/duplicate) appear when products selected
Admin Inventory page - stats cards, donut chart, search bar, edit dialog
AI Chatbot page - suggestion buttons, chat input, send button, AI responses
OCR Image Search page - upload area displays correctly
Navigation - Chat and OCR links appear in navbar after login

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI: Static routes (/products/bulk, /products/duplicate, /products/admin) must be defined BEFORE parameterized routes (/products/{product_id}) - FIXED
Some product images may have broken URLs (Măng cụt Lái Thiêu shows alt text)
seed_data_creation: Cleaned up test data (gdgsd, TEST_BulkDelete products) after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Route ordering bug fixed. AI Chat and OCR endpoints use Gemini 3 Flash via Emergent LLM Key. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_organic_store_api.py cover auth, products CRUD, bulk operations, chat, OCR, user registration, cart, and contact form.
